note: Submodule of quicktabs; adds one TabRenderer. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), grounded in the 4.3.x docs.

evals.prompt: I want a Quick Tabs instance to use the jQuery UI Tabs widget. Which submodule do I enable and which renderer id does it add?
evals.expected_output: Enable quicktabs_jqueryui, which registers the ui_tabs TabRenderer; select the 'jquery ui' renderer on the quicktabs_instance.

evals.prompt: Which modules must be present for the Quick Tabs jQuery UI renderer to work, and which library does it load?
evals.expected_output: It depends on the block module and jquery_ui_tabs (plus the parent quicktabs module); it loads the jquery_ui_tabs/tabs library via js/qt_ui_tabs.js.

evals.prompt: Does the Quick Tabs jQuery UI submodule add its own config, permission, or admin page?
evals.expected_output: No; it adds only the ui_tabs renderer (no config entity, permission, schema options, or Drush command). Configure it in the parent Quick Tabs admin at Structure > Quick Tabs (/admin/structure/quicktabs).
